evalAfter: (async () => { const r = {}; r.bloqueado = !!document.querySelector('.da-block, #daBlockOverlay, [id*=block i]'); r.loginVisible = !document.getElementById('loginOverlay')?.classList.contains('hidden'); try { document.querySelector('[onclick*="nav(\'catalogo\')"], [data-nav=catalogo], #navCatalogo')?.click(); } catch(e){ r.navErr = e.message; } if (window.MOS && MOS.nav) { try { MOS.nav('catalogo'); } catch(e){ r.navErr2 = e.message; } } await new Promise(res => setTimeout(res, 6000)); r.cards = document.querySelectorAll('.cat-card').length; r.btnNuevoProducto = !!document.querySelector('[onclick*=abrirModalProducto]'); r.chipsRot = document.querySelectorAll('.rot-chip').length; r.nombresEdit = document.querySelectorAll('.cat-nombre-edit').length; r.botonesPlus = document.querySelectorAll('.cat-btn-plusctx').length; r.trash = document.querySelectorAll('.cat-btn-trash').length; return r; })()
